subcodes.title: Words to George Latimer
subcodes.first_line: After one has paid all his necessary expenses 19% of what is left is then taken by him and given as Huquq.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از آنکه شخص کلیۀ مخارج ضروریّه را پرداخت نمود، نوزده درصد از آنچه باقی مانده را اخذ
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @law of Huququ'llah, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
